ProductPricingDocsField NotesSign up
Start vendor onboarding
Vendor Program

Sell governed AI assets to regulated buyers without rebuilding trust from zero.

Veklom gives vendors a professional distribution surface for plugins, compliance packs, pipeline templates, edge integrations, and security-reviewed marketplace assets. Listings are reviewed, versioned, audit-aware, and built for buyers who care about procurement risk.

Governed listings

Each listing carries category, execution, trust, commercial, and validation metadata so buyers understand what it does and how it is controlled.

Security review

Submissions pass through Veklom review, marketplace validation, audit status, and lifecycle controls before production availability.

Regulated distribution

Position assets for hospitals, banks, insurers, government teams, and infrastructure operators that need defensible AI controls.

Step 01

Create a vendor profile

Register a workspace, create the vendor profile, and accept the Marketplace Vendor Agreement.

Step 02

Upload the asset bundle

Attach documentation, manifest, version, install notes, permissions, and validation evidence.

Step 03

Pass marketplace review

Veklom checks security posture, metadata quality, buyer fit, and auditability before an asset becomes active.

Step 04

Publish and measure

Approved assets become discoverable in the marketplace with install tracking, audit status, and version history.

© 2026 Veklom. Governed AI marketplace distribution.
